productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men adiPure Slide Navy Blue Flip Flops
description: Designed to move naturally with your foot, these adiPURE Slides by adidas are super flexible, with a low-to-the-ground feel and lots of stretch. The ultra-soft SUPERCLOUD footbed adds to the comfort of these men's swim and sport flip flops.UpperNeoprene cross-strap upper for flexible FitPatterned footbed matches the shape of your footUltra-soft SUPERCLOUD quick-dry footbed for comfort and odor control - it wicks away moisture, inhibits odour and fungus and ensures air flow to keep your feet coolBrand name printed on the footbedOutsoleRubber outsole for durability and comfortFlip flop careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustNot for shower use
